summary: Patched the execution-board runner to persist refreshed latest-lane truth and refreshed the live latest lane artifacts.

findings: outcome_execution_board_runner could execute distribution-architecture work without updating distribution_lane_latest.{json,md}
that stale latest-lane snapshot could hide an active short-hold release from the next rerun even when the execution board already knew it
refreshing latest-lane truth is a valid same-run hold-window action because it improves the scheduled post-hold rerun odds without generating fake progress
shared_findings_used: outcome_execution_board_latest.json: runner had selected distribution_architecture_churn_guard_repair while the latest-lane snapshot stayed stale
distribution_lane_latest.json: short_review_window_release_at was missing before the refresh
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet existed inside the active review window
